text.title: Tool-Call Schema Design Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Tool-Call Schema Design Checklist output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: any checklist_status entry == false at ship
description is single-word or missing example

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: tool_id populated with a typed value
checklist_status populated with a typed value
name_format populated with a typed value
description_text populated with a typed value
idempotency populated with a typed value
error_format populated with a typed value
enum_constraints populated with a typed value
default_output_terseness populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
